scenarios.prompt: Audit one code.build contract checkpoint. Your first tool call must be native todo with exactly one pending item named audit. Do not use read, grep, or glob in the parent. Then make exactly one native task call using the tasks[] batch form. The tasks[0].agent JSON value must be exactly "explore"; do not use scout or any alias. Set the task batch context to "single read-only checkpoint". Its task text must begin with these exact first characters: [workflow=code.build step=step-1 todo=audit skills=build-toolchain-diagnostics]. Ask the child to read plugins/omp-enhancer-core/src/workflows/definitions/code.js and report whether code.build requires the exact build command and current failure evidence. Wait for it, mark the one todo complete, and return one sentence. Do not modify files, run shell commands, or use the network.
